svg.title: Production RAG System Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture showing ingestion pipeline on the left, vector store in the center, and retrieval pipeline with chatbot on the right

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data sources does a production RAG system support?')
sendPrompt('What is the document loader stage in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategies are used in production RAG?')
sendPrompt('Why is metadata enrichment important in RAG ingestion?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding models are used in production RAG?')
sendPrompt('What role does the ingestion queue play in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What vector databases are used in production RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is hybrid search in a vector store?')
sendPrompt('What is query rewriting in RAG and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('How does the retriever work in a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What is a reranker and why use one in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How is context assembled before sending to the LLM?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM use the retrieved context in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How are citations generated in RAG responses?')
sendPrompt('How is observability implemented in a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('How does caching work in production RAG?')
sendPrompt('How is guardrail and safety implemented in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How is RAG evaluation done in production?')
